heading: Sunday
text: Rain, becoming widespread before noon, and mixing with snow over the mountains, then diminishing west to east in the afternoon and early evening. Cooler, Highs in the 40s to low 50s in the morning, falling through the afternoon. Light wind becoming northwest 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 15 mph late in the day.

heading: Sunday Night
text: Scattered rain or snow drying out early leading to partial clearing mainly south and east. Lows in the 20s to near 30 south. Northwest wind 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Monday
text: Variable clouds and sun. A few early morning scattered snow showers over the western Greens. Highs in the 30s to near 40 north, in the low to mid 40s south. Northwest wind 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph.
